title: Op^3: OptumGX-OpenSeesPy-OpenFAST Integration Framework for Offshore Wind Turbines
description: Op^3 (pronounced O-p-cubed) is an integrated numerical modelling framework for offshore wind turbine support structures. It bridges OptumGX (3D FE limit analysis), OpenSeesPy (structural dynamics, BSD-3-Clause), and OpenFAST v5 (aero-hydro-servo-elastic, Apache 2.0) into a single V and V'd Python pipeline. Four foundation modes span the hierarchy from rigid base (Mode A) to a novel dissipation-weighted formulation (Mode D). Calibrated against the NREL reference wind turbine library and the Gunsan 4 MW class field site. Developed alongside a PhD dissertation on prescriptive maintenance of offshore wind turbine foundations (Seoul National University, 2026).

creators.name: Kim, Kyeong Sun
creators.affiliation: Department of Civil and Environmental Engineering, Seoul National University

notes: The OpenFAST v5.0.0 binary and r-test directory are used under Apache 2.0 with attribution preserved. NREL reference wind turbine inputs are used under their respective open licenses.
